# server-full

Server cmd-params: listen/basehref/auth/gzip/proxy/TLS/dex/webhook/k8sClient from cmd-params sample

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/cmd-params/server-full` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  server.listen.address: "0.0.0.0"
  server.metrics.listen.address: "127.0.0.1"
  server.insecure: "false"
  server.basehref: /argo
  server.rootpath: /argo
  server.staticassets: /shared/app
  server.disable.auth: "false"
  server.enable.gzip: "true"
  server.enable.proxy.extension: "true"
  server.sync.replace.allowed: "true"
  server.x.frame.options: sameorigin
  server.api.content.types: application/json
  server.content.security.policy: frame-ancestors 'self'
  server.http.cookie.maxnumber: "50"
  server.profile.enabled: "true"
  server.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  server.webhook.parallelism.limit: "50"
  server.webhook.refresh.workers: "20"
  server.glob.cache.size: "10000"
  server.log.format: json
  server.log.level: info
  server.app.state.cache.expiration: 1h
  server.default.cache.expiration: 24h
  server.connection.status.cache.expiration: 1h
  server.oidc.cache.expiration: 3m
  server.dex.server: https://argocd-dex-server:5556
  server.dex.server.plaintext: "false"
  server.dex.server.strict.tls: "true"
  server.tls.minversion: "1.2"
  server.tls.maxversion: "1.3"
  server.tls.ciphers: TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
  server.repo.server.timeout.seconds: "60"
  server.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
  server.repo.server.strict.tls: "true"
  server.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  server.k8s.client.burst: "100"
  server.k8s.client.max.idle.connections: "500"
  server.k8s.tcp.timeout: 30s
  server.k8s.tcp.keepalive: 30s
  server.k8s.tcp.idle.timeout: 5m
  server.k8s.tls.handshake.timeout: 10s
  server.k8sclient.retry.max: "2"
  server.k8sclient.retry.base.backoff: "200"
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer: {}
  controller: {}
  repoServer:
    client:
      insecureSkipVerify: false
      timeout: 1m0s
      tlsEnabled: true
  server:
    apiContentTypes:
    - application/json
    authEnabled: true
    baseHref: /argo
    cache:
      appStateExpiration: 1h0m0s
      connectionStatusExpiration: 1h0m0s
      defaultExpiration: 24h0m0s
      globCacheSize: 10000
      oidcExpiration: 3m0s
    compression: gzip
    contentSecurityPolicy: frame-ancestors 'self'
    dexConnection:
      address: https://argocd-dex-server:5556
      insecureSkipVerify: false
      tlsEnabled: true
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    httpCookieMaxNumber: 50
    k8sClient:
      burst: 100
      maxIdleConnections: 500
      qps: "50"
      retry:
        backoff:
          duration: 200ms
        max: 2
      tcp:
        idleTimeout: 5m0s
        keepAlive: 30s
        timeout: 30s
      tlsHandshakeTimeout: 10s
    listen:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      metricsAddress: 127.0.0.1
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    profileEnabled: true
    proxyExtensionEnabled: true
    rootPath: /argo
    staticAssetsPath: /shared/app
    syncReplaceAllowed: true
    tls:
      ciphers:
      - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
      maxVersion: "1.3"
      minVersion: "1.2"
    tlsEnabled: true
    webhook:
      parallelismLimit: 50
      refresh:
        workers: 20
    xFrameOptions: sameorigin
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  controller.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
  controller.repo.server.strict.tls: "true"
  controller.repo.server.timeout.seconds: "60"
  server.api.content.types: application/json
  server.app.state.cache.expiration: 1h0m0s
  server.basehref: /argo
  server.connection.status.cache.expiration: 1h0m0s
  server.content.security.policy: frame-ancestors 'self'
  server.default.cache.expiration: 24h0m0s
  server.dex.server: https://argocd-dex-server:5556
  server.dex.server.plaintext: "false"
  server.dex.server.strict.tls: "true"
  server.disable.auth: "false"
  server.enable.gzip: "true"
  server.enable.proxy.extension: "true"
  server.glob.cache.size: "10000"
  server.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  server.http.cookie.maxnumber: "50"
  server.insecure: "false"
  server.k8s.client.burst: "100"
  server.k8s.client.max.idle.connections: "500"
  server.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  server.k8s.tcp.idle.timeout: 5m0s
  server.k8s.tcp.keepalive: 30s
  server.k8s.tcp.timeout: 30s
  server.k8s.tls.handshake.timeout: 10s
  server.k8sclient.retry.base.backoff: "200"
  server.k8sclient.retry.max: "2"
  server.listen.address: 0.0.0.0
  server.log.format: json
  server.log.level: info
  server.metrics.listen.address: 127.0.0.1
  server.oidc.cache.expiration: 3m0s
  server.profile.enabled: "true"
  server.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
  server.repo.server.strict.tls: "true"
  server.repo.server.timeout.seconds: "60"
  server.rootpath: /argo
  server.staticassets: /shared/app
  server.sync.replace.allowed: "true"
  server.tls.ciphers: TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
  server.tls.maxversion: "1.3"
  server.tls.minversion: "1.2"
  server.webhook.parallelism.limit: "50"
  server.webhook.refresh.workers: "20"
  server.x.frame.options: sameorigin
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-rbac-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: controller.repo.server.plaintext
  message: writing same value to controller.repo.server.* and server.repo.server.*
    keys
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: controller.repo.server.strict.tls
  message: writing same value to controller.repo.server.* and server.repo.server.*
    keys
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: controller.repo.server.timeout.seconds
  message: writing same value to controller.repo.server.* and server.repo.server.*
    keys
  severity: warn
- direction: cm->cr
  key: server.repo.server.plaintext
  message: using server.repo.server.* value; controller.repo.server.* is preferred
  severity: warn
- direction: cm->cr
  key: server.repo.server.strict.tls
  message: using server.repo.server.* value; controller.repo.server.* is preferred
  severity: warn
- direction: cm->cr
  key: server.repo.server.timeout.seconds
  message: using server.repo.server.* value; controller.repo.server.* is preferred
  severity: warn
```
